settings.title: Settings
settings.hint: Hover a setting to see its description
auth.totp_hint: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app, or one of your recovery codes.
profile.totp_desc: Add a second step at sign-in using an authenticator app like Google Authenticator, Authy, or 1Password.
profile.totp_step1_text: Open your authenticator app and scan the code below. The app will start generating 6-digit codes for this account.
profile.totp_step2_text: Type the 6-digit code from the app to confirm enrollment.
profile.totp_recovery_warn: Store these codes somewhere safe (password manager). Each code works once if you lose your authenticator. They will not be shown again.
profile.totp_disable_text: Confirm with your password and a current code (or recovery code) to remove the second factor from this account.
profile.totp_regenerate_text: Old recovery codes stop working immediately. Confirm with your password and a current code.
profile.title: Profile
profile.change_password_desc: Update your GamesDownloader login password. You will need your current password to confirm.
profile.no_saves: No battery saves yet. Battery saves are created automatically while playing.
profile.paste_gog_code: Paste GOG redirect URL or code...
profile.no_save_states: No save states yet. Save states are created while playing in the browser emulator.
store.sources_desc: Add store URLs to browse and install plugins from.
store.available_desc: Browse and install plugins from your configured sources.
appearance.reset_confirm: Reset all card effects to defaults?
appearance.card_effects_desc: Interactive visual effects applied to game covers in the library grid.
appearance.tilt_hint: Cover follows cursor in 3D space on hover
appearance.shine_hint: Cursor-tracked light reflection on cover surface
appearance.zoom_hint: Cover scales up slightly when hovered
appearance.glow_hint: Accent colour halo around the card on hover
appearance.lift_hint: Deep drop-shadow gives the card depth on hover
appearance.game_detail_desc: Hero background and cover settings - apply to both Modern and Classic layouts.
appearance.hero_classic_hint: Show blurred art background behind cover (Classic view)
appearance.hero_blur_hint: Blur intensity on the game detail hero (0 = sharp, 40 = heavy blur)
appearance.hero_anim_hint: Cinematic camera effect on the hero background
appearance.anim_style_hint: Choose the type of camera motion applied to the hero
appearance.anim_speed_hint: How fast the camera effect plays
appearance.hero_fade_hint: Gradient blend between hero and content (0 = off)
appearance.emulation_library_desc: Visual options for the platform library header bar.
appearance.platform_photo_hint: Console photo as animated header background with info panel
theme.layout_desc: Changes the entire layout structure and navigation style.
theme.skin_desc: Changes the color palette. Works with any layout.
theme.orbs_hint: Glowing colour orbs in the background
theme.settings_desc: Advanced controls specific to the {name} theme.
ts.theme.modern.desc: Top navbar, rich animations, glass effects.
ts.theme.classic.desc: Left sidebar with game list, library switcher.
ts.hint.skinSolid: Switches the color palette. All accent colors, glows, active states, and toggle highlights will update to match.
ts.hint.skinDual: Two-color gradient skin: accent and glow use two distinct hues for a vivid dual-tone look.
ts.glassBlur.label: Glass Blur
ts.glassBlur.hint: Backdrop blur strength for all glass panels
ts.glassBlur.desc: Backdrop-filter blur for all glass panels. Higher = frosted opaque look; lower = more transparent. Set to 0 to disable blur entirely.
ts.glassSat.label: Glass Saturation
ts.glassSat.hint: Color saturation boost applied through glass
ts.glassSat.desc: Saturation multiplier applied through glass. Increase to make skin colors pop through frosted panels.
ts.navbarBlur.label: Navbar Blur
ts.navbarBlur.hint: Extra blur for the top navigation bar
ts.navbarBlur.desc: Independent blur for the top navigation bar, separate from global Glass Blur.
ts.cardGlow.label: Card Glow on Hover
ts.cardGlow.hint: Accent color ring glows when hovering game cards
ts.cardGlow.desc: Accent-colored ring glow on game cards when hovering. Disable for a flat, minimal card grid.
ts.hoverLift.label: Card Hover Lift
ts.hoverLift.desc: Cards rise 4px on hover, creating a subtle 3D depth effect. Disable for a completely flat interface.
ts.tabGlow.label: Active Tab Accent Glow
ts.tabGlow.hint: Subtle skin-colored glow on the active library tab
ts.tabGlow.desc: Soft skin-colored backlight behind the active library tab in the sidebar. Disable for a flat sidebar.
ts.sidebarWidth.label: Sidebar Width
ts.sidebarWidth.hint: Width of the left game-list panel
ts.sidebarWidth.desc: Controls the width of the left sidebar that holds the game list. Widen it to see longer game titles without scrolling.
ts.logPanelHeight.label: Log Panel Height
ts.logPanelHeight.hint: Height of the output / log panel at the bottom
ts.logPanelHeight.desc: Controls how tall the OUTPUT / LOG panel is at the bottom of the sidebar. Set smaller for more game list space, larger for more log lines visible.
ts.coverHeight.label: Cover Image Height
ts.coverHeight.hint: Height of the game cover in the detail panel
ts.coverHeight.desc: Controls how tall the game cover card appears in the Classic game detail view. Width scales proportionally (2:3 ratio).
ts.logoGlow.label: Logo Glow
ts.logoGlow.hint: Skin-colored glow filter on the app logo
ts.logoGlow.desc: Skin-colored drop-shadow glow on the app logo. Disable for a cleaner, more minimal header.
ts.uiGlow.label: UI Glow Intensity
ts.uiGlow.hint: Multiplier for glow effects on active UI elements
ts.uiGlow.desc: Multiplier for glow effects on active UI elements: tabs, highlights, and button accents. Set to 0 for a completely flat interface.
ts.orbCount.label: Orb Count
ts.orbCount.desc: Controls how many glowing orbs appear in the background. 1 is minimal, 2 adds depth, 3 creates a full atmospheric backdrop.
ts.orbSpeed.label: Orb Speed
ts.orbSpeed.desc: Multiplier for animation duration. At 1x orbs drift very slowly; at 3x movement is clearly visible. Has no effect when Orb Motion is disabled.
ts.orbSize.label: Orb Size
ts.orbSize.hint: Scale of orbs relative to viewport
ts.orbSize.desc: Scales all orb radii relative to the viewport. Larger values create sweeping gradients across the screen; smaller values keep orbs tucked in corners.
ts.orbGlow.label: Orb Intensity
ts.orbGlow.desc: Multiplier for orb opacity. Increase for a vivid color wash; decrease for a subtle, barely-there glow.
ts.orbPattern.label: Motion Pattern
ts.orbPattern.hint: How orbs move across the screen
ts.orbPattern.desc: Organic: natural irregular floating. Drift: slow horizontal sweep. Pulse: breathes in place with scale and opacity changes. Vortex: constant-speed circular orbit.
ts.orbTravel.label: Orb Travel
ts.orbTravel.desc: Multiplies the distance orbs travel per cycle. At 1x movement is subtle; at 2-3x orbs sweep across a large portion of the screen.
hint.tilt: The cover rotates in 3D space following your mouse cursor, giving a depth/parallax feel. Uses CSS perspective transforms - zero performance impact.
hint.shine: A soft radial highlight follows your cursor across the cover surface, simulating a light reflection. Works best combined with 3D Tilt.
hint.zoom: Slightly scales up the cover when you hover over it. Combine with Tilt for an extra depth effect.
hint.glow: A coloured accent glow pulses around the card border on hover, matching the active skin colour.
hint.lift: Adds a deep drop-shadow beneath the card when hovered, creating the illusion that the card is lifting off the page.
hint.hero_classic: Shows blurred game art as a full background behind the cover in Classic view. Disable for a minimal look. The blur and animation settings below apply to both layouts.
hint.hero_anim: Applies a cinematic camera effect to the hero background image (zoom, pan, pulse). Controlled by the Style and Speed settings below.
hint.hero_fade: Adds a gradient overlap between the hero background and the page body, softening the hard edge where the two sections meet. 0 = disabled, higher values create a taller fade zone.
hint.platform_photo: When enabled, shows the scraped console photo as an animated background in the platform library bar, with the console image and metadata centered. Disable to revert to the standard glass panel look.
hint.animations: Enables or disables all UI motion: page transitions, card hover lift, fade-ins, and sliding elements. Disable this if you prefer a completely static interface or if animations cause discomfort.
hint.orbs: Renders large, blurred glowing orbs in the background that follow the active skin color. They create a dynamic, atmospheric backdrop. Disable this for a flat, solid background - recommended for low-end hardware or minimal aesthetics.
hint.orb_motion: When enabled, orbs continuously float and animate using GPU-accelerated transforms. When disabled the orbs are frozen in place - you still get the color glow without any CPU/GPU animation cost. Useful on weaker hardware or if you find moving backgrounds distracting.
hint.grid: Overlays a subtle dot-grid or line-grid pattern on the background. The grid fades toward the edges using a radial mask so it blends naturally with the orbs. Pure aesthetic - no functional impact.
security.title: Security
security.subtitle: Brute-force protection, ClamAV antivirus, and audit log.
security.ban_duration_hint: How long to block the IP after threshold
security.no_definitions: No virus definitions found. Click Update Definitions to download (~300 MB).
security.report_only_hint: Log the finding, do nothing to the file. Review and act manually.
security.quarantine_hint: Move the file to a safe quarantine folder. Restore or delete from the Quarantine section below.
security.delete_perm_hint: Irreversible. Use only if you are certain ClamAV won't produce false positives for your files.
security.enable_clamav_hint: Master switch - disables all antivirus functionality when off.
security.auto_scan_upload_hint: Automatically scan each uploaded file as soon as it lands on the server.
security.auto_scan_download_hint: Scan GOG installer files after they finish downloading to the downloads folder.
security.auto_update_defs_hint: Automatically download the latest signatures at a set interval.
security.update_defs_desc: Downloads the latest virus signature database from database.clamav.net (~300 MB on first run). The daemon restarts automatically after a successful update. Definitions are stored on a persistent volume and survive container restarts and rebuilds.
security.manual_scan_desc: Select one or more folders to scan. Each file is checked individually against the virus database.
security.scan_delete_warn: ClamAV is set to DELETE infected files permanently. Proceed with scan?
security.quarantine_desc: Files moved here by the scanner. Review each entry before restoring or permanently deleting.
security.trusted_proxies_desc: IPs or CIDR subnets trusted as reverse proxies. When a request arrives from a trusted proxy the real client IP is read from X-Forwarded-For. Private/LAN addresses are always trusted automatically.
security.ip_allowlist_hint: Block all requests from IPs not on the list below.
security.cors_hint: Use * for all origins, or list specific ones.
security.reg_disabled_hint: No new registrations allowed. Existing users are unaffected.
security.reg_invite_hint: New users need a valid invite code to register. Generate codes below.
security.stay_logged_desc: Duration of the login session (refresh token lifetime). Applies to new logins.
security.session_note: Existing sessions are not affected - only new logins will use the new duration.
security.smtp_shared: SMTP server is shared with Notifications. Configure it there first.
security.alert_recipient_hint: Admin email address for security alerts
security.alert_new_ip: Alert on login from new IP address
security.alert_admin_promoted: Alert when user is promoted to admin
gog.library_sync_desc: Refresh your GOG game library from the server.
gog.not_connected_desc: Link your GOG library to sync and download your games.
gog.step1: Open GOG authorization and log in
gog.step3: Paste it below and click Connect
gog.disconnect_confirm: Disconnect your GOG account? You will need to reconnect to access your GOG library.
metadata.title: Metadata Scrapers
metadata.subtitle: API keys for artwork and game info. Sensitive values are encrypted at rest.
metadata.backup_subtitle: Download every scraped record as a JSON archive. Keep this file safe - it lets you restore your library without re-scraping.
metadata.backup_hint: Includes GOG games, Library games, ROM platforms, ROMs and game requests.
metadata.backup_opt_media: Include media files (covers, fanarts, screenshots, bezels, video)
metadata.backup_opt_settings: Include API keys, SMTP, webhooks and app settings
metadata.backup_opt_settings_what: Covers: scraper API keys (IGDB, RAWG, SteamGridDB, ScreenScraper), SMTP (host/port/user/password/from), webhook URL + avatar + all message templates, OAuth/SSO (Google, GitHub, Microsoft, OIDC), brute-force config, IP allowlist, ClamAV config, Transmission, plugin store sources, registration mode, alert recipients, report schedule.
metadata.backup_opt_settings_warn: Sensitive - secrets are encrypted with the server's AUTH_SECRET_KEY. The backup is portable only between installs that share the same key.
metadata.restore_subtitle: Pick a backup ZIP to merge into the current install. Metadata is upserted by external IDs, so re-running on the same install is safe.
metadata.restore_warn: Restoring overwrites existing rows that match by external ID. Make a fresh backup before running this.
metadata.restore_opt_metadata: Restore metadata (game info, ROM index, requests)
metadata.restore_opt_settings: Restore API keys and app settings
metadata.restore_opt_settings_warn: Only useful when restoring on the same install or one that shares AUTH_SECRET_KEY
metadata.restore_confirm: This will overwrite existing data. Continue?
metadata.restore_nothing_picked: Pick at least one of: metadata, media, settings.
roms.auto_sync_saves_hint: Periodically upload battery saves while you play, so a tab crash never loses progress
roms.auto_sync_interval_hint: How often to check for save changes
rhint.auto_sync_saves: When enabled, the in-browser emulator periodically uploads the battery save (.srm) to the server while you play. The server deduplicates by content hash so unchanged saves do not waste storage.
rhint.auto_sync_interval: Lower values protect against crashes more aggressively but make more network requests. Most games are fine with 60s.
login.reset_link_sent: If an account with that email exists, a reset link has been sent.
login.generic_error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
login.sso_user_not_found: No account found matching your SSO identity. Contact an administrator.
login.sso_provider_denied: Access was denied by the identity provider.
login.sso_state_invalid: Authentication session expired. Please try again.
login.sso_token_error: Could not obtain tokens from the identity provider.
login.sso_not_configured: This SSO provider is not configured.
security.report_recipient_info: Recipient is configured in Email Alerts → Alert recipient above. SMTP is shared with Notifications.
security.report_frequency_hint: How often to send the report
security.sso_alongside_desc: Local login + SSO buttons shown together
security.sso_replace_desc: Only SSO buttons shown (local login hidden)
security.sso_note: Users must already exist in GamesDownloader and be matched by email or username. Self-registration via SSO is not supported.
security.infected_found: infected file(s) found! See scan history below.
security.progress_hint: Progress is shown in real time. Requires the ClamAV daemon to be running (update definitions first if the daemon is stopped).
security.daemon_not_running_warn: ClamAV daemon is not running. Update virus definitions to start it.
shint.bf_body: When enabled, repeated failed login attempts from the same IP are tracked. After reaching the threshold the IP is banned for the configured duration.
shint.bf_max_body: Number of failed login attempts allowed within the time window before the IP is banned. Recommended: 5.
shint.bf_window_body: Sliding window in seconds during which failed attempts are counted. If the window expires the counter resets. Recommended: 300 (5 min).
shint.bf_ban_body: How long the IP remains banned after exceeding the threshold. The admin can manually unban an IP from the Banned IPs table below. Recommended: 900 (15 min).
shint.bf_whitelist_body: Comma-separated list of IP addresses that are never blocked, regardless of failed attempts. Add your local network (e.g. 192.168.1.0/24 is not supported - add individual IPs). Loopback 127.0.0.1 is always whitelisted.
shint.cv_status_body: Shows whether the ClamAV background process is running and ready to scan. The daemon loads all virus signatures into memory (~300 MB) on startup - this takes 30–60 s. Use Refresh after updating definitions.
shint.cv_report_body: The infected file is left untouched. Only the scan result and threat name are recorded in the database. Use this if you want to manually review findings before acting.
shint.cv_quarantine_body: The infected file is moved to /data/clamav/quarantine/ and a database record is created. You can restore it to its original location or permanently delete it from the Quarantine section below. Safer than Delete because it is reversible - useful when dealing with false positives.
shint.cv_delete_body: The infected file is immediately and irreversibly removed from disk. Use only if you are confident ClamAV will not produce false positives for your content. Game executables, old DOS/Win9x binaries, emulators, and certain crack/patch files are commonly flagged as false positives.
shint.cv_enable_body: Master switch for all ClamAV functionality. When off, no auto-scans are triggered on upload or download, and manual scans are disabled.
shint.cv_auto_upload_body: Every file uploaded through the web UI is automatically scanned immediately after it is saved to disk. If a threat is found the configured action (quarantine/delete/report) is applied. Adds a small delay to the upload completion.
shint.cv_auto_download_body: Automatically scans GOG installer files once they finish downloading to /data/downloads. Useful to catch threats in downloaded content before it is published to the library.
shint.cv_auto_update_body: Automatically runs freshclam at the configured interval to keep virus signatures up to date. The daemon is restarted automatically after each update. Requires network access to database.clamav.net from within the container.
shint.cv_interval_body: How often freshclam checks for new signatures. Min 1 h, max 168 h (7 days). The update loop checks every hour - the actual update runs only when the configured interval has elapsed since the last run.
shint.cv_update_body: Downloads the latest virus signature database from database.clamav.net (~300 MB on first run). The ClamAV daemon is automatically restarted after a successful update. Progress is shown in the log below in real time. Definitions are stored on a persistent volume and survive container restarts.
shint.cv_scan_body: Starts a manual scan of all selected folders. Files are scanned one by one against the virus database and the configured action (none / quarantine / delete) is applied to any infected file. Progress is shown in real time below. The ClamAV daemon must be running.
shint.net_proxies_body: IPs and CIDR ranges of your reverse proxies (nginx, Traefik, Caddy…). When traffic arrives from these IPs the real client IP is extracted from X-Forwarded-For. Private (RFC-1918) addresses are always trusted. One entry per line or comma-separated.
shint.net_allowlist_body: When enabled, only IPs and subnets on the list can access the server. All other IPs receive a 403 response. Loopback (127.0.0.1) is always allowed. Leave the list empty to allow all when the toggle is off.
shint.net_allowed_ips_body: Comma-separated list of IP addresses and CIDR ranges that are allowed to access the server. Example: 192.168.0.0/24, 10.0.0.5. Only used when the IP Allowlist toggle is enabled.
shint.net_cors_body: Origins that are allowed to make cross-origin requests to this API. Use * to allow all (default). Separate multiple origins with commas. Example: https://app.example.com, https://mobile.example.com. Changes take effect immediately.
shint.net_reg_body: Controls how new accounts are created. Open: anyone can register. Disabled: no new registrations. Invite Only: a valid invite code is required - generate codes below.
shint.net_session_body: How long users stay logged in before they must sign in again. A shorter lifetime is more secure; a longer one is more convenient. Changes apply to new logins only - existing sessions are not affected.
shint.email_smtp_body: Security alerts use the same SMTP server configured in Settings → Notifications. Configure SMTP there first, then set the alert recipient and triggers here.
shint.email_recipient_body: Email address that will receive security alert notifications (e.g. failed logins, new IP logins). Only the admin receives these alerts.
shint.email_failed_body: Send an email when a login attempt fails due to wrong password or unknown username. Deduplicated per IP - at most one alert per 10 minutes per source IP.
shint.email_newip_body: Send an email when a user successfully logs in from an IP address not seen in their login history. Useful for detecting account takeovers.
shint.email_newuser_body: Send an email when a new user account is created via the registration form. Helps you track who is joining your server.
shint.email_admin_body: Send an email when a user account is granted administrator privileges. Important for detecting unauthorized privilege escalation.
shint.email_ban_body: Send an email when an IP address is automatically banned after exceeding the failed login threshold. Useful for detecting targeted attacks.
shint.report_body: Periodic summary email with login stats, download activity, and ClamAV scan results. Uses the same SMTP and recipient configured in Email Alerts.
shint.report_enable_body: When enabled, a summary email is automatically sent on the configured schedule.
shint.report_freq_body: How often the security report is sent. Weekly = every 7 days, Monthly = every 30 days.
shint.sso_mode_body: Alongside: users can log in with both local username/password and SSO buttons. Replace: only SSO buttons shown on the login page (local login still accessible via a small link for emergencies).
shint.sso_oidc_enable_body: Show this provider as a login option on the login page.
shint.sso_discovery_body: The OpenID Connect discovery endpoint (.well-known/openid-configuration). Example: https://keycloak.example.com/realms/myrealm/.well-known/openid-configuration
shint.sso_provider_name_body: Display name shown on the SSO button in the login page. E.g. Keycloak, Authentik, Company SSO.
shint.sso_scopes_body: OAuth2 scopes to request. Must include openid. Add email and profile to get user info for matching.
shint.sso_redirect_body: Add this URL as an allowed redirect URI in your OIDC provider.
shint.sso_tenant_body: Use common for personal + work accounts, organizations for work accounts only, or your specific tenant ID/domain.
shint.audit_filter_body: Type an action keyword (e.g. login, logout, upload, download, scan) to narrow the results. Press Enter or click Search to apply the filter.
shint.audit_search_body: Apply the current filter text and reload the first page of results.
shint.audit_clear_body: Permanently deletes all audit log entries from the database. This action cannot be undone. Use with caution - the audit log is your only record of who did what and when.
shint.cv_path_scan_suffix: Each file is checked individually - large libraries may take several minutes.
downloads.title: Downloads
downloads.subtitle: Download tokens and server-side speed limits.
downloads.token_created: Token created - copy this link now (it won't be shown again):
downloads.global_limit_hint: 0 = unlimited · applies to all users without a personal override
downloads.delete_confirm: Delete this download token? The link will stop working immediately.
dhint.file_body: The library file this token grants access to. Only one file per token.
dhint.expires_body: How many hours until the link stops working. Leave blank for a link that never expires.
dhint.max_body: How many times this link can be used to download the file. Leave blank for unlimited downloads.
dhint.password_body: Optional password to protect this link. Anyone with the link must enter this password to download. Leave blank for no password.
dhint.note_body: Optional label to help you remember what this token is for (e.g. for John, Discord share).
dhint.global_speed_body: Applies to all users who do not have a per-user override. Set to 0 for unlimited. Examples: 1 = 1 MB/s, 5 = 5 MB/s, 0.5 = 512 KB/s.
dhint.per_user_body: Override the global limit for individual users. Set to 0 to remove the override (user falls back to global).
transmission.title: Transmission
transmission.enable_hint: Run the Transmission daemon in this container
transmission.upnp_hint: Auto-open port via UPnP (off by default)
transmission.saved: Transmission settings saved. Port and peer settings require a container restart.
thint.tr_enable_body: When enabled, Transmission daemon runs inside this container and handles torrent downloads and seeding. Disabling only affects new operations; existing downloads continue until restart.
thint.tr_port_body: TCP/UDP port used to communicate with other torrent peers. Must be opened in your firewall/router for incoming connections. Default: 51413.
thint.tr_random_body: Pick a random peer port each time Transmission starts. Useful if your ISP blocks common ports but harder to configure firewall rules.
thint.tr_upnp_body: Automatically ask your router to open the peer port via UPnP. Disabled by default - manual router configuration is more reliable and secure.
thint.tr_hostname_body: Override the IP address or hostname that Transmission announces to trackers. Required when the server is behind NAT or Docker and the auto-detected address is wrong. Enter your LAN IP or external domain. Leave empty to auto-detect.
thint.tr_dht_body: Distributed Hash Table - allows finding peers without a tracker. Recommended on.
thint.tr_utp_body: Micro Transport Protocol - reduces network congestion by adjusting transfer rate. Recommended on.
thint.tr_lpd_body: Local Peer Discovery - finds peers on your LAN without a tracker. Only useful on local networks.
thint.tr_dl_speed_body: Limit Transmission download speed in KB/s. Only affects torrent downloads, not direct downloads.
thint.tr_ul_speed_body: Limit Transmission upload speed in KB/s. Applies to both seeding library files and admin downloads being seeded back.
thint.tr_ratio_body: Stop seeding when upload ratio reaches this value (uploaded ÷ file size). E.g. 2.0 means upload twice the file size.
thint.tr_trash_body: Delete .torrent files added to Transmission once they are loaded into the queue. Saves disk space.
thint.tr_log_body: 0 = none, 1 = error, 2 = info, 3 = debug. Lower levels reduce log noise.
roms.library_desc: Configure where ROM files are stored and how scanning behaves.
roms.library_path_hint: Root folder for all ROM platforms
roms.auto_scan_hint: Scan for new ROMs when the server starts
roms.scrapers_desc: Metadata sources used when scraping ROM information.
roms.ss_desc: Box art, screenshots, regional metadata, video, manuals
roms.lb_desc: Metadata fallback · 7-day XML cache · No API key required
roms.presets_desc: Per-platform configuration for what ScreenScraper downloads. Cover type and additional media can differ between platforms.
roms.no_platforms: No platforms found. Add ROM files and run a scan first.
roms.hltb_desc: Bulk-rescrape playtime estimates (Main Story + 100%) for all libraries. Runs in background - 1 request/s to avoid rate limits.
roms.hltb_started: Started - check server logs for progress.
roms.priority_note: Scraper priority: ScreenScraper → IGDB → LaunchBox. First source wins per field.
rhint.library_path_body: Directory on the server where ROM files are stored. ROMs must be organised in subfolders named after the platform (e.g. /data/games/roms/n64/).
rhint.auto_scan_body: When enabled, the ROM library is scanned for new files every time the application starts.
rhint.lb_body: Downloads and caches the free LaunchBox Games Database XML. Used as a third fallback for metadata.
notif.smtp_desc: Send email notifications when games are synced or downloaded.
notif.download_complete_desc: Send email when a game finishes downloading
notif.library_sync_desc: Send email after GOG library sync completes
notif.game_requests_desc: Send email on new request, approval, or rejection
notif.subject: Subject
notif.webhooks_desc: POST notifications to any URL. Supports Discord rich embeds with cover images.
notif.discord_desc: Sends a rich embed with title, description, optional cover image thumbnail, and fields.
notif.fire_download: Fire when a game finishes downloading
notif.fire_sync: Fire after GOG library sync completes
notif.fire_request: Fire on new request, approval, or rejection
notif.avatar_desc: Image shown as the webhook bot avatar in Discord
notif.include_cover_desc: Attach the game's cover art as embed thumbnail
plugins.installed_desc: Manage installed plugins, toggle them on/off, or configure their settings.
plugins.install_desc: Upload a .zip plugin package to install it.
plugins.dropzone: Drop a .zip file here or click to browse
plugins.phint_settings_body: Open the configuration panel for this plugin.
plugins.phint_disable_body: Disable this plugin. It will remain installed but inactive.
plugins.phint_enable_body: Enable this plugin so it can run.
plugins.phint_delete_body: Permanently remove this plugin and all its data.
pstore.sources_desc: Add store URLs to browse and install plugins from.
pstore.available_desc: Browse and install plugins from your configured sources.
pstore.add_source_empty: Add a plugin source to get started.
pstore.no_plugins: No plugins available from your sources.
pstore.restart_needed: Theme plugin installed - restart required to compile Vue components.
pstore.restarting: Restarting server... page will reload automatically.
users.title: User Management
users.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete {name}? This cannot be undone.
random.title: Random Game
detail.clear_scraped: Clear all scraped metadata? File info and hashes are preserved.
detail.choose_display_sub: How would you like to open the emulator?
detail.start_select_hint: Press Start + Select during gameplay to open the emulator menu
library.select_game: Select a game from the list
library.show_available: Show only games with available files
library.clear_confirm_body: This will remove all scraped metadata from every game in your library. This cannot be undone.
library.sync_auto_meta_desc: After syncing, fetch descriptions, covers, screenshots and other info from GOG for all new games.
library.sync_overwrite_desc: Re-download covers, descriptions and screenshots for games that already have metadata (slower).
library.scan_custom: Scan CUSTOM folder for new games
library.empty_hint: Publish games from GOG Library or drop files into /data/games/CUSTOM/ and click Scan
library.add_roms_hint: Add ROM files to /data/games/roms/{platform}/ and run a scan.
library.select_platform_desc: Choose the platform you want to add ROMs to.
library.drop_roms: Drop ROM files here or browse
library.no_roms: No ROMs found for this platform.
upload.title: Upload Game File
requests.title: Game Requests
requests.subtitle: Vote for games you'd like to see added
requests.info_placeholder: Why should this game be added? Any useful context…
requests.no_gog_synced: No games synced. Go to Profile to sync your GOG library.
requests.no_matches: No matches found - you can still submit manually below.
torrent.title: Add Game via Torrent
classic.clear_confirm_body: This will remove all metadata for every game in the library. Game entries will remain but all data must be re-scraped. This action cannot be undone.
classic.refresh_meta_body: This game has ratings from external sources (RAWG / IGDB). Do you also want to refresh them, or refresh GOG data only?
classic.clear_game_body: This will remove all metadata for {title}. The game entry will remain, but data must be re-scraped.
meta.no_cover_data: No cover data - make sure the game has been synced.
meta.no_results: No results. Try a different search term.
meta.sgdb_covers_hint: Covers from SteamGridDB - includes animated WebP/GIF variants.
meta.rawg_hint: RAWG provides wide background artwork for each game.
meta.no_gog_logo: No GOG logo available for this game.
meta.sgdb_logos_hint: Transparent logos and game icons from SteamGridDB.
meta.no_screenshots: No screenshots yet. Search below to add some.
meta.no_screenshots_found: No screenshots found. Try a different search term.
meta.no_video: No video set. Paste a YouTube URL below or search by provider.
meta.lang_hint: (comma-separated ISO codes: en, pl, de, fr…)
meta.req_staged: Requirements staged - click Save Changes to apply.
meta.igdb_hint: Search IGDB (Twitch) for cover artwork. Requires API keys configured in Metadata settings.
meta.no_igdb_results: No results. Check IGDB API keys in Settings → Metadata.
meta.no_desc_found: No descriptions found. Try a different title or check API keys.
meta.no_desc_available: No descriptions available. Check API keys in Settings → Metadata.
meta.enter_title_hint: Enter a title above and click Fetch - or edit the description manually below.
meta.no_reqs: No requirements data stored for this game.
meta.no_results_try: No results. Try a different search term.
meta.no_trailers: No trailers found. Try a different search term.
meta.click_search_trailers: Click Search to find trailers from IGDB.
meta.no_rawg_results: No results. Check RAWG API key in Settings → Metadata.
meta.no_detail_results: No results found. Try a different title.
meta.enter_title_fetch: Enter a title above and click Fetch - or fill in the fields manually below.
meta.fetching_details: Fetching from GOG, Steam, RAWG, IGDB…
meta.fetching_descriptions: Fetching descriptions from GOG, Steam, RAWG, IGDB…
meta.no_steam_reqs: No requirements found on Steam - try entering the App ID or URL
meta.search_rom_hint: Search for this ROM. Selecting a result loads all media (cover, hero, screenshots, description).
meta.no_results_check: No results. Check credentials in Settings → Metadata.
meta.box_art_hint: Box Front · Box 3D · Box Spine · Box Back
meta.no_box_art: No box art variants found for this game.
meta.select_game_first: First select a game in the Cover tab.
meta.no_bg_art: No background art found for this game.
meta.no_screenshots_rom: No screenshots yet. Select some below.
meta.no_ss_found_rom: No screenshots found for this game.
meta.no_support_art: No support art found. Select a game in the Cover tab first.
meta.no_bezels: No bezels found. Select a game in the Cover tab first.
meta.no_wheel: No wheel/marquee/logo art found. Select a game in the Cover tab first.
meta.no_steamgrid: No Steam Grid art found. Select a game in the Cover tab first.
meta.no_videos: No videos found. Select a game in the Cover tab first.
meta.select_game_desc: Select a game in the Cover tab to load its description.
meta.no_desc_rom: No description found for this game.
meta.scrape_started: Scrape started - metadata will update in a moment.
couch.title: Couch Mode
couch.theme_change_hint: You can change theme anytime from the in-game menu (M)
couch.emulator_info: Player opens in a new tab. Use in-player menu for save states, rewind and core settings.
plugins.empty_subtitle: Upload a .zip plugin file to get started
setup.welcome.title: Welcome to GamesDownloader
setup.welcome.description: Let's get you set up in just a few steps. You'll create an admin account, connect your game sources, and configure the app to your liking.
setup.admin.title: Create Admin Account
setup.admin.subtitle: This will be the primary administrator account.
setup.admin.error.password_strength: Must contain at least one letter and one number
setup.gog.title: Connect GOG Account
setup.gog.subtitle: Link your GOG library to sync games automatically. You can skip and connect later in Settings.
setup.gog.instruction.1: Click Open GOG Authorization or copy the link to open it in your browser
setup.gog.instruction.2: Log in to GOG and approve the request
setup.gog.instruction.3: Copy the full redirect URL (embed.gog.com/on_login_success?...) and paste it below
setup.gog.avatar.question: Use this as your GamesDownloader profile picture?
setup.gog.avatar.note: Profile picture will be set when you click Continue.
setup.gog.error.invalid_code: Invalid or expired code. Make sure you copied the full redirect URL.
setup.scrapers.title: Metadata Scrapers
setup.scrapers.subtitle: API keys for artwork and game info. All optional - add later in Settings.
setup.scrapers.igdb.name: IGDB
setup.scrapers.steamgriddb.name: SteamGridDB
setup.scrapers.rawg.name: RAWG
setup.scrapers.screenscraper.name: ScreenScraper
setup.scrapers.screenscraper.desc: ROM metadata, box art & regional info
setup.smtp.title: Email Notifications
setup.smtp.subtitle: Configure SMTP to send notifications. Optional - you can set this up later.
setup.smtp.placeholder.test_to: your@email.com - where to send the test email
setup.app.title: Application Settings
setup.app.subtitle: Configure basic app behavior. All settings can be changed later in the Settings panel.
setup.app.toggle.name: Open Registration
setup.app.toggle.desc: Allow anyone to register a new account. Disable for invite-only.
setup.complete.title: Setup complete!
setup.complete.description: GamesDownloader is ready. Skipped items can be configured later in Settings.
